name: Edunita Yurtdışı Eğitim
notes: HIDDEN GEM. Founder Gloria Day — Italian-Turkish bilingual, Italian high school alumna. 100% Italy focused. Polimi/Polito/Bologna testimonials. Architecture & Engineering prep perfectly aligned with H-FARM profile. No complaints whatsoever.

name: Firenze Yurtdışı Eğitim
notes: Türkiye'nin en köklü İtalya odaklı eğitim danışmanlığı (30 yıl+). 30'dan fazla İtalyan üniversitesi partneri — dünya genelinde rekor. MEB onaylı İtalyanca ve İspanyolca dil merkezi bünyesinde; CILS resmi sınav merkezi. Istituto Marangoni, NABA, Domus Academy temsilcisi. 10.000'den fazla öğrenci göndermiş. 27K Instagram takipçisi. Tıp (IMAT), mühendislik ve tasarım sınavlarına hazırlık kursları. Türkiye'de İtalyan üniversite yetkililerini misafir ediyor.

name: EduScala Eğitim Danışmanlık
notes: 2019'dan beri yalnızca İtalya odaklı. Domus Academy, NABA, Istituto Marangoni ve UniCamillus'un resmi Türkiye temsilcisi. 1.000'den fazla öğrenci referansı. IMAT, TIL-I, Bocconi Test, TOLC hazırlık kursları sunuyor — H-FARM başvuru profiliyle doğrudan örtüşüyor. UED (Uluslararası Eğitim Danışmanları Derneği) üyesi. İtalya'daki ekibi sayesinde yerelde operasyonel destek kapasitesi var.

name: Vera Eğitim Danışmanlık
notes: 1992'den beri İtalyanca ile içiçe; 2000'den beri eğitim danışmanlığı. 24 İtalyan okul/üniversitenin resmi Türkiye temsilcisi. Domus Academy'e rekor öğrenci gönderen tek Türk danışmanlık firması (2012 Domus davetiyesi). Blog italyada.net güçlü SEO varlığı. Mimarlık, tasarım, moda ve tıp ağırlıklı portföy — H-FARM innovation & business programlarıyla tamamlayıcı nitelikte.

name: Pisa Edu (Pisa Educazione)
notes: Turkey's highest-volume Italy pipeline. Turin office is close to H-FARM Treviso campus — site visit feasible. IMAT prep + summer school integration opportunity. 31K Instagram followers. italyadaegitim.com is an SEO domain belonging to the same firm.

name: Aktif Yurtdışı Eğitim (Aktifedu)
notes: Strong Italy content depth: Bocconi, Polimi, Polito, Sapienza, Florence, Pisa, Trento — all with dedicated pages. IMAT prep content. February 2026 Bocconi blog post = active Italy focus. Multi-city reach valuable for H-FARM awareness.

name: ITEBS International Education
notes: YEDAB founding member — strong prestige signal. Active Italy student flow. ICEF + IEFT fair presence → H-FARM co-marketing opportunity. WYSETC, British Council, PABA top 7 globally memberships.

name: ICES Turkey
notes: AI-powered university matching platform aligns with H-FARM innovation narrative. YEDAB member. Multi-city presence. Opportunity to add H-FARM to AI matching tool.

name: NGGlobal International Education
notes: Italy listed first on website. Small team, fast decisions. Pilot partner candidate for H-FARM summer school.

name: Academix International Education
notes: Turkey's widest branch network — high co-marketing reach. Italy summer school segment exists. Study Travel Magazine Super Star Agency (5×) award.

name: ELT International Education
notes: Italy student flow since 1999. Summer school collaboration potential is moderate. 25+ years of experience is a positive signal.

name: Global Vizyon International Education
notes: 25+ years and large headcount are positives; however complaint volume does not meet H-FARM partnership criteria.

name: Eduvizyon International Education
notes: Franchise model could serve as an inschool channel to new cities. Italy-specific activity is limited.

name: Global International Education
notes: Founded 1989 — one of Turkey's most established. No Italy specialisation and digital presence appears outdated.

name: Pianeta Italia Eğitim ve Danışmanlık
notes: Tüm İtalyan devlet üniversiteleri için danışmanlık veren tek kurum olduğunu iddia ediyor. Mimarlık, mühendislik, tıp, tasarım, moda, gastronomi, sinema ağırlıklı içerik. IED Milano moda bölümü dahil birçok özel akademinin Türkiye temsilcisi. İstanbul'da MEB'e bağlı İtalyanca kursu düzenliyor. Facebook (717 beğeni + 111 ziyaret) ve aktif blog içeriği.

name: Atlas Yurtdışı Eğitim Danışmanlığı
notes: Türkiye'nin en büyük ve en köklü yurtdışı eğitim danışmanlığı (35 yıl+). ISO 9001 sertifikası. TURSAB A grubu üyesi. Study Travel Magazine Star Award'ı Türkiye'ye getiren ilk ve tek firma. ICEF, IALC, ALTO, English UK üyesi. Atlas Group bünyesinde Akare, Edcon, Orbis, Troy, Studylon gibi grup şirketleri. İtalya portföyde mevcut ancak birincil odak değil.

name: FutureMe Yurt Dışı Eğitim Danışmanlığı
notes: 20+ yıllık tecrübeye sahip genel danışmanlık firması. İngiltere birincil odak; İtalya genel Avrupa portföyünde yer alıyor ancak özel içerik ya da uzmanlaşma görülmüyor. İtalya odaklı kapasitesi geliştiğinde Phase 2 adayı.

name: Pava Education
notes: İtalya merkezli (Milano HQ) ile İstanbul ve İzmir ofisleri. Kurucu Dr. Hakan Bilici, Pavia Üniversitesi Tıp mezunu — İtalya bürokrasisine tam hakimiyet. 2023-2024 akademik yılında %93 kabul oranı iddiası. Tıp, mühendislik, mimarlık ağırlıklı; H-FARM'ın İngiltere/ABD dışı Avrupa iş dünyası profiliyle tamamlayıcı. Yeni nesil büyüyen firma.

notes: Closest major uni to H-FARM (≈30 min). Multilingual student body. Great host for joint Veneto programmes.

name: University of Rome Tor Vergata
focus_areas: Economics · Engineering · Medicine · Humanities · 12+ international degree courses in English
notes: Strong international focus. Second-tier Rome public option behind Sapienza but more English-friendly.

name: University of Florence
focus_areas: Architecture · Arts · Economics · Engineering · Humanities
notes: Florence brand carries weight. Strong design/architecture overlap with AI Fashion Lab.

name: University of Trento
focus_areas: Computer Science · Engineering · Economics · Cognitive science — small research-intensive
notes: Punches above its weight in CS rankings. Selective student body, good fit for technical summer programmes.

name: University of Milan (La Statale)
focus_areas: Medicine · Sciences · Humanities · Law · Pharmacy
notes: Milan's big public. Less focused on tech/innovation than Polimi but huge bachelor pipeline.

name: Scuola Superiore Sant'Anna
focus_areas: Robotics · Bioengineering · Economics · Political science · Agriculture · selective research school
notes: Elite admission, only 50-60 students/yr. Top robotics in Italy. Boutique partner for advanced workshops.

name: Scuola Normale Superiore
focus_areas: Humanities · Sciences · Selective elite research school — undergraduates 8/year per discipline
notes: Italy's most selective. Tiny but prestigious. Not a volume play; relationship-only for prestige brand association.

name: University of Pavia
focus_areas: Medicine · Engineering · Sciences · Economics · Pharmacy — historical (founded 825)
notes: Long history. Smaller campus. Decent English-taught options in engineering & medicine.

name: Università degli Studi di Verona
focus_areas: Business · Economics · Languages · Computer Science
notes: Veneto region peer. Strong business+languages combination.

name: University of Pisa
focus_areas: Engineering · Computer Science · Physics · Mathematics · Medicine
notes: Birthplace of Italian CS (Cinetica & Fibonacci). Tech-strong public. Pair with Sant'Anna for Pisa-cluster pitch.

name: Bocconi University
focus_areas: Business · Economics · Finance · Management · Law · Data Science — Italy's #1 business school
notes: Top Italian private. Selective. Direct competitor for premium MBA students but ideal joint-programme partner for Startup AD-Venture + Brand Building.

name: LUISS Guido Carli
focus_areas: Business · Economics · Political science · Law · Communications
notes: Rome's premier private. Strong policy/political science track. Connection-rich alumni network.

name: Università Cattolica del Sacro Cuore
focus_areas: Business · Economics · Medicine · Communications · Humanities — Italy's largest private uni
notes: Catholic university with 40k+ students across 5 campuses. Family-values brand alignment for Italian + Latin American markets.

name: Free University of Bozen-Bolzano
focus_areas: Trilingual EN/DE/IT · Economics · Computer Science · Design · Tourism
notes: Alpine multilingual campus. Tiny but very international (Austrian/German/Italian crossroads). Niche partner.

name: Università LUMSA
focus_areas: Communications · Law · Economics · Education
notes: Catholic-tradition private uni. Strong PR/communications programmes — good for Brand Building summer programme.

name: John Cabot University
focus_areas: American liberal arts · Business · Communications · Economics · International affairs · fully English-taught
notes: Top American uni in Italy. ALREADY runs American semester-abroad programmes — direct format competitor BUT possible reciprocal partner for US-side student exchanges.

name: The American University of Rome (AUR)
focus_areas: American liberal arts · International business · Communications · Archaeology · fully English-taught
notes: Second American uni in Rome. Smaller than John Cabot. Same dynamic — competition + potential exchange partner.

name: Polimoda
focus_areas: Fashion design · Fashion business · Fashion marketing · Top-10 fashion school worldwide · FIT NYC partner
notes: BEST fit for AI Fashion Lab summer programme. Florence brand carries luxury weight. FIT NYC connection is a bridge — H-FARM is ALREADY tied to FIT NYC via exchange programme.

name: NABA - Nuova Accademia di Belle Arti
focus_areas: Design · Fashion · Creative industries management · Visual arts · Set design · Media
notes: Milan's premier design school. Top 100 worldwide. Multi-disciplinary creative. Natural fit for AI Fashion Lab + Brand Building.

name: Domus Academy
focus_areas: Postgraduate design · Fashion design · Interaction · Service design · top-100 art/design
notes: Italy's first postgrad design school (1982). Postgraduate-only. Strong industry projects approach — direct parallel to H-FARM's project-based pedagogy.

name: IED - Istituto Europeo di Design
focus_areas: Design · Fashion · Visual arts · Communications · 4 Italian campuses + Madrid + Barcelona + São Paulo
notes: Multi-campus creative school. ~2000 foreign students annually. Largest Italian creative network.

name: Istituto Marangoni
focus_areas: Fashion design · Fashion business · Luxury management · Multi-campus (Milan/Florence/London/Paris/Miami/Shanghai/Mumbai)
notes: Founded 1935. Global creative network. Heavy luxury industry ties — perfect for the AI Fashion Lab summer programme.

name: Politecnico di Bari
focus_areas: Engineering · Architecture — main southern polytechnic
notes: Italy's south leg of the polytechnic network. Smaller than Milano/Torino, growing tech focus.

name: University of Naples Federico II
focus_areas: All disciplines · world's oldest public uni (1224) · large undergraduate pipeline
notes: Massive public in the south. Volume pipeline. Less English-internationalised than northern peers but huge feeder for postgrad mobility.

name: University of Genoa
focus_areas: Engineering · Maritime studies · Economics · Medicine
notes: Northwest port city public. Maritime/naval focus is niche but unique.
